mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clandb.bellatra_team_score (account_name, character_name, job_code, level, clan_code, score, kills, total_point, total_user, success_user, code, date) VALUES (#{accountName}, #{characterName}, #{jobCode}, #{level}, #{clanCode}, #{score}, #{kills}, #{totalPoint}, #{totalUser}, #{successUser}, #{code}, #{date})
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.bellatra_team_score SET character_name = #{newName} WHERE character_name = #{oldName}
